title: DeliveryRow derives Debug, exposing private_key_pem
description: In delivery.rs line 13, DeliveryRow derives Debug and contains private_key_pem (the RSA signing key). If this struct ever appears in a panic message, error chain, or debug log, the full private key leaks to wherever logs are collected. The private_key_pem field is included because the delivery worker joins accounts.private_key_pem to sign outbound requests. Impact: key disclosure if any code path formats this struct with {:?} (e.g. unwrap() on a Result<DeliveryRow>, or future debug logging). Fix: implement a manual Debug that redacts the field, or split the struct so the key is held separately.
